layout: ../layouts/Page.astro title: Imprint description: Legal information and contact details for steltner.cc email hosting services.

Imprint

Information according to legal requirements

Service Provider

Steltner.cc Email Hosting
Tobias Steltner
[Your Address]
[Your City, Postal Code]
[Your Country]

Contact Information

Email: tobias@steltner.cc
Website: https://steltner.cc

Service Description

Steltner.cc provides professional email hosting services using self-hosted mailcow infrastructure. Our services include:

  • Self-hosted mail servers with full data control
  • Professional email accounts with custom domains
  • Modern webmail interface with calendar and contacts
  • Advanced security features and spam protection
  • Technical support and server maintenance

Technical Infrastructure

Our email hosting services are built on:

  • Dockerized mailcow mail server solution
  • Self-hosted infrastructure for complete data sovereignty
  • Professional-grade security and backup systems
  • 24/7 monitoring and maintenance

Liability Disclaimer

While we strive to provide reliable email hosting services, we cannot guarantee 100% uptime or absolute security. Users are responsible for maintaining backups of their important communications.

Data Protection

For information about how we handle your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
